# Harness reference

## Commands

- `setup`: `pnpm install`
- `build`: `pnpm build` — tsup 出 ESM+CJS+d.ts 到 dist/
- `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`
- `lint`: `pnpm lint`
- `test`: `pnpm test` — Vitest + 覆盖率
- `docs`: `pnpm typedoc` — 生成 API 文档
- `verify`: `harness verify`
- `release`: `pnpm changeset publish` — 发布到 npm (mutating — confirm first)

## Registered knowledge

- `.agents/knowledge/domain.md` (role=domain)
- `.agents/knowledge/journal/` (role=journal)
